textByHashes.86a285b64b9bd488976dfa4f603553ee5164c15d: Sorry, I'm afraid we're just closing now. You'll have to come back another time.
textByHashes.ece545698ffd46c0a4d723e41a99b8091be4e635: Oh, well that's different then. Must be pretty important for her to send you all this way.
textByHashes.395d13cad8f470566dcdb8bf5a66c6993b09abe7: Guidor? This one's on me then, I owe him more than a few favours.
textByHashes.a0dfd2a8dca3a34980f4a228fc91c444e3df1938: I should warn you though, getting to him might not be easy if you're carrying any chemicals. The guards are searching anyone heading to that part of Varrock.
textByHashes.bc1812ecfb5cfa3af4f2d6d3900ecdb00df67d03: With touch paper as well? You're asking for trouble. You'd better use my errand boys outside. Give them a vial each. I must warn you though, they do have a habit of stealing things.
textByHashes.b60e1e155169f5fad41b7475bb49c14040c1fdd2: Just make sure you give them something they have no reason to steal. One's a painter, one's a gambler, and one's a drunk. Not ideal I know, but if you pay peanuts you'll get monkeys, right?
textByHashes.f8e0c7bf763989263abc425fe4acbb0081db5d1b: Now don't stand around here gassing. This is clearly important to Elena. You'll find Guidor's home in the south east corner of Varrock.
textByHashes.f4623b90cbd57ed88bad7e0d1ddcdf7e7a551a68: Oh hello, do you need more touch paper?
textByHashes.1697d05828770453757697ad79d07aedc5844b18: Fair enough, don't forget to talk to my errand boys outside if you need help getting things to Guidor. I must warn you though, they do have a habit of stealing things.
textByHashes.61457152fce256c61d4e60aeb2ecf215d13c5abb: Don't forget to talk to my errand boys outside if you need help getting things to Guidor. I must warn you though, they do have a habit of stealing things.
textByHashes.39b0b8a05b55e4ffeb20dd3152da979f54744e76: Ah, you'll be wanting to use the still then. It's just outside.
textByHashes.e023e16697eaa70145c63605c2ead7d988fbff8d: It's quite simple really. You have to get the still heat up very high for it to work. However, if it gets too hot it will burn out and you will have to start over.
textByHashes.9e64bf3337a6188ee6cad8295c87debd1f53a0e1: You must also watch the pressure, if it gets too high you will also have to start over. There are valves to control pressure and tar flow. These will also affect the heat of the still.
textByHashes.27ce6d2f4c5d22f363afb28258f258eb30a5be10: You'll also need plenty of coal to keep the still hot.
textByHashes.805daee115f876c76d4e0518de03f6230d638275: Hello there, the fuel you need is lamp oil, do you need help making it?
textByHashes.1c13cac0d80ee958d4a140b0300620edc088a0bc: It's really quite simple. You use the small still in here. It's all set up, so there's no fiddling around with dials...
textByHashes.d23a4dd73c0263076bc5ae8eeee724fa37708376: Just put ordinary swamp tar in, and then use a lantern or lamp to get the oil out.
textByHashes.3efde58949c44e18325614b02529834bab3ad818: Good to hear, sorry but I have a few things to do right now.
textByHashes.488c34e218b6fb15024f24f0e328e50e065c55af: Jolly good, the odder the better. I like oddities.
textByHashes.02cfee85efe2e3776df7fdd070375312a23157ec: That is an odd question. I commend you for it. Why would you want to do that?
textByHashes.6a4a253fc48df4e175f0cdcdc45106faa6308c45: So, do you have any of this fish-and-flower flavoured oil and a butterfly jar then?
textByHashes.3cd6af7ea4fb133aaa4f03105766d8b79656f563: Well then. Hmmm. My lamp oil still may be able to do what you want. Give it a go and see if it works.
textByHashes.18efc8c910526be4d05febe111c2e7a7134a1e4b: If you go and get them then I may be able to help you. I'm better at coming up with answers if the questions are in my hands.
textByHashes.597d79b3e65d9019d62ecd844fdaf726c40e1bda: Anchovies are pretty oily fish. I'd have thought you could just grind them up and sieve out the bits. You'd probably want to remove any water first - Cooking should do that pretty well.
textByHashes.9a1058d33983a992b793339e8a2ec4896b627f66: Errm, yes. But you already have one. Two sieves is a bit excessive, don't you think?
textByHashes.23f5b6841984c5340a3c52a8cc082d965882aede: Are you sure you don't already have one?
textByHashes.16c500f5fd6a42e1d779545b9ee4de1a2e17f6cf: Errm, yes. Here, have this one. It's only been used for sieving dead rats out of sewer water.
textByHashes.1150a4c63aa86d99ba23569fcbc256df899e072a: Well, it should be ideally suited to your task.
